Workflow.name: Ascension-Workflow-Update-UserName

Variable.name: transient
Variable.Description: Set to false to cause workflow-related objects, such as approval work items, to be saved in the database even if they are only viewed by the person registering.

Variable.name: requester
Variable.Description: Identity of the user who launched the workflow. Only an IIQ Administrator can launch this workflow.

Workflow.Description: A Workflow to modify the reporting relationship, i.e. from one manager to another one

Step.name: Show User
Step.Description: Present the administrator with a form to select the current and future managers.
